message:
fix(ws): properly close WebSocket connections before removing

HeartbeatManager improvements:
- Use closeConnection() instead of removeConnection() for dead connections
- Ensures WebSocket is properly closed with 1001 status before cleanup
- Prevents connection leaks and improves client reconnection behavior

WebSocket hub changes:
- hub.ts: Add closeConnection method for graceful shutdown

Log parser improvements:
- apps/web/src/hooks/useLogParser.ts: Hook refinements
- apps/web/src/workers/logParser.worker.ts: Worker improvements

Agent driver updates:
- packages/agent-drivers/src/tmux/tmux-driver.ts: Tmux driver fixes

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
